content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：骸骨长眠之所，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所
你见过最可怖而亵渎的啖食，却是他们生命中最温柔的重逢。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Sanctuary of Final Repose" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST: "Sanctuary of Final Repose" 
The most horrifying and profane feast you've ever witnessed was, for them, the most tender of reunions.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：骸骨长眠之所
